title: Post-Office
shortDescription: Survival horror set in an abandoned post office — complete your shift tasks, repair failing equipment and survive the night.
description:
Post-Office is a survival horror game set in an abandoned postal office. You play as an employee working the night shift: complete assigned tasks, keep the failing equipment running and survive encounters with the dangerous entities inhabiting the darkened facility.
The gameplay loop combines task completion and equipment repair with evasion and combat against the horrors roaming the building.
Built with Unity in C#, with custom ShaderLab/HLSL shaders for the visual atmosphere. Developed as part of the ADA game development team and released on GameJolt.
